name: Flat-Adaptive Annular Green Kernel
description: Exact Dirichlet Green kernel for the flat-adaptive radial annulus a<r<b. Starting from the promoted divergence-form radial operator Delta_f^rad=(1/w_f)(w_f d/dr)' with shell weight w_f(r)=2 pi lambda_0 r_0^{-beta} r^{beta+1}, the Green function is obtained by integrating the reciprocal shell weight and matching the usual jump condition for -(w_f G_r)'=delta. The resulting kernel is explicit for every beta, and the critical beta=0 branch reduces exactly to the logarithmic 2D annular Green function. This gives the potential-theory completion of the existing flat-adaptive annular capacity law rather than only a boundary-flux observable.
assumptions: Power-law flat branch pi_f(r)=pi lambda_0 (r/r_0)^beta with lambda_0>0.
Radial Dirichlet problem on the annulus a<r<b with a>0.
The source is interpreted in the weighted radial measure associated with Delta_f^rad, equivalently -(w_f G_r)'=delta.
The beta->0 branch is interpreted by the exact logarithmic limit of the same reciprocal-shell formula.
evidence: Exact divergence-form derivation using H(r)=int_a^r w_f(t)^(-1) dt and K(r)=int_r^b w_f(t)^(-1) dt.
Closed form for beta!=0: G_beta(r,rho)=((a^{-beta}-r_<^{-beta})(r_>^{-beta}-b^{-beta}))/(2 pi lambda_0 r_0^{-beta} beta (a^{-beta}-b^{-beta})).
Closed form for beta=0: G_0(r,rho)=ln(r_</a) ln(b/r_>)/(2 pi lambda_0 ln(b/a)).
Exact symmetry and boundary conditions: G_beta(r,rho)=G_beta(rho,r), with G_beta(a,rho)=G_beta(b,rho)=0.
This is the Green-function completion of the promoted flat-adaptive annular capacity law and harmonic annular profile.
